CL-01.title: Website Security Certificate
CL-01.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, exposing user data to security risks.
CL-01.remediation: Install and configure a valid SSL certificate to encrypt the data transmitted between the user and the server.

CL-11.title: Password Security
CL-11.description: The website allows weak password creation without enforced security measures, making it vulnerable to brute force attacks.
CL-11.remediation: Implement password strength requirements and enable multi-factor authentication for enhanced security.

CL-20.title: GDPR Compliance
CL-20.description: The website lacks a GDPR compliance statement and explicit user consent mechanisms for data processing.
CL-20.remediation: Implement GDPR-compliant privacy policies, cookie consent, and data processing notifications.
